name: Fists
description: Your trusty pair of fists.

texts.critical_hit: You deliver a smashing blow to the {0} with your {1}.
texts.missed_hit: You flail your arms, failing to even touch the {0}.

name: Club
description: A crude wooden club. Better than nothing.

texts.critical_hit: You crack the {0} over the head with your {1}!
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} thumps the ground beside the {0}.

name: Whip

texts.critical_hit: Your {1} cracks across the {0} like a thunderclap!
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} cracks the air past the {0}.

name: Dagger
description: A sharp, lightweight dagger. Quick but light.

texts.critical_hit: You drive your {1} into the {0} up to the hilt!
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} whistles harmlessly past the {0}.

name: Quick Blade

texts.critical_hit: Your {1} flickers twice and the {0} barely sees either cut!
texts.hit: Your {1} flicks against the {0} almost too fast to follow.
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} darts past the {0} in a blur.

description: A slender duelling blade. Light, fast, and precise.

texts.critical_hit: You lunge and put your {1} clean through the {0}!
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} darts past the {0} without finding purchase.

name: Quarterstaff
description: A balanced wooden staff. Reliable and forgiving.

texts.critical_hit: You crack your {1} down on the {0} in a perfect arc!
texts.hit: You rap the {0} smartly with your {1}.
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} swishes past the {0}.

name: Magic Staff
description: An ashwood staff keyed to channel raw magic. Boosts all spellcasting schools.

texts.critical_hit: You catch the {0} with a perfect strike of your {1}!
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} swishes harmlessly past the {0}.

name: Short Sword
description: A dependable short blade favoured by adventurers.

texts.critical_hit: You run the {0} clean through with your {1}!
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} glances past the {0}.

name: Hand Axe
description: A heavy chopping axe. Hits hard when it lands.

texts.critical_hit: You bury your {1} deep in the {0}!
texts.hit: You chop at the {0} with your {1}.
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} bites into the wall beside the {0}.

name: Scimitar
description: A curved blade built for quick, slashing cuts.

texts.critical_hit: You open the {0} from hip to shoulder with your {1}!
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} curves wide of the {0}.

name: Mace
description: A spiked iron mace. Crushes bone and armour alike.

texts.critical_hit: You bring your {1} down on the {0} with a sickening crunch!
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} thuds against the flagstones past the {0}.

name: Flail

texts.critical_hit: Your {1} whips around the {0}'s guard and shatters it!
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} swings wide and tangles past the {0}.

name: Spear
description: A long spear with good reach.

texts.critical_hit: You skewer the {0} on your {1}!
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} jabs past the {0}.

name: Trident
description: A three-pronged spear, equally at home on land or in water.

texts.critical_hit: All three tines of your {1} punch into the {0}!
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} glances off the floor past the {0}.

name: Demon Trident

texts.critical_hit: All three burning tines of your {1} punch clean through the {0}!
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} hisses past the {0}, tines smoking.

name: Morningstar
description: A spiked flanged head atop a sturdy haft. Brutally simple.

texts.critical_hit: You stave in the {0}'s skull with your {1}!
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} drags past the {0}, spikes scraping stone.

name: Falchion
description: A wide, single-edged blade built for cleaving strikes.

texts.critical_hit: You cleave deep into the {0} with your {1}!
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} rings off stone beside the {0}.

name: Dire Flail

texts.critical_hit: Both heads of your {1} crash into the {0} at once, crushing it!
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} tangles wildly, missing the {0} entirely.

name: Broad Axe

texts.critical_hit: Your {1} splits the {0} clean to the spine!
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} bites the flagstones beside the {0}.

name: Demon Blade

texts.critical_hit: Your {1} flares black and tears the {0} apart!
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} hisses through the air past the {0}.

name: Eveningstar

texts.critical_hit: Your {1} crushes the {0} with a sound like breaking stone!

texts.critical_hit: Your {1} flares with holy light and shatters the {0}!

name: Long Sword
description: A fine balanced long sword. The mark of a real warrior.

texts.critical_hit: You sweep your {1} through the {0} in a single brilliant stroke!
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} rings against stone beside the {0}.

name: Eudemon Blade

texts.missed_hit: Your {1} flashes past the {0} without finding its mark.

name: Trishula

texts.critical_hit: All three blades of your {1} punch through the {0} as one!
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} glances past the {0}, blades ringing.

name: Demon Whip

texts.critical_hit: Your {1} lashes the {0} to ribbons in a single crack!
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} snaps the air past the {0}.

texts.critical_hit: Both edges of your {1} open the {0} in a single brutal sweep!

texts.hit: You hack at the {0} with your {1}.
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} sweeps past the {0}, too unwieldy to correct.

name: Battleaxe

texts.critical_hit: Your {1} near-cleaves the {0} in half!
texts.missed_hit: The weight of your {1} carries it past the {0}.

name: Great Sword

texts.missed_hit: The weight of your {1} drags it past the {0}.

texts.critical_hit: Your {1} catches the {0} square on the point and drives through!
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} jabs past the {0}, lugs scraping stone.

name: Glaive

texts.critical_hit: Your {1} sweeps clean through the {0}!
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} arcs wide of the {0}.

name: War Axe

texts.critical_hit: You cleave the {0} from shoulder to hip with your {1}!

texts.hit: Your {1} cuts the {0} as it spins.

name: Great Mace
description: An enormous iron-bound mace. Few can swing it twice.

texts.critical_hit: Your {1} pulps the {0} in a single, earth-shaking blow!

texts.critical_hit: Your {1} caves in the {0} with one earth-shaking swing!
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} thunders into the ground, missing the {0} by a mile.

texts.critical_hit: Your {1} mows through the {0} in a single titanic sweep!

name: Giant Spiked Club

texts.critical_hit: Your {1} drives the {0} into the ground in a single ruinous blow!

description: A vast, gleaming axe meant for one purpose. Rarely sold, never lent.

texts.critical_hit: Your {1} takes the {0}'s head clean off!
texts.missed_hit: Your {1} buries itself in the stone floor, missing the {0}.

name: Sling

name: Hand Crossbow

texts.critical_hit: Your bolt punches into the {0} with surprising force!

name: Short Bow
description: A hunter's bow. Reliable damage from a safe distance.

texts.critical_hit: Your arrow buries itself to the fletching in the {0}!

name: Crossbow
